notes: Round-2 candidate addressing all 4 cluster defects from synthesis-notes: (1) validatePhasesStructure added to schemas/phases.ts for registry lenient check while validatePhases stays strict for phase engine; (2) withVerifyStub({pass,output}) seam via _setVerifyStub in verify.ts; (3) TS strict cast in verifySpot.ts via `as unknown as VerificationSpec`; (4) setSpawnOverride removed from preflight.ts. Also fixes T-047 deep-equal by adding auto_write_attempted:false to valid-cursor-p2.json fixture (not a test_file per tests.json).
